form.formComment: First starter by Prince Fawaz out of Rock On Ivy. Third March 24 at Warwick at his only trial. Any positive move in betting must be respected.

form.formComment: Matt Kropp trained two-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Looked good in a recent trial win. Inside barrier will assist chances. Looks ready to make an immediate impact.

form.formComment: At debut, second last of 7 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 800m, 5 len behind Lonesome Star carrying 58kg at $14. Ran 3rd in a Sunshine Coast Inner Track trial over 850m on March 31. Fitter and cam show more.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run eased back early on 4th of 7 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1350m, 2.75 len behind Brumal carrying 58kg at $9.50. The start before that 3rd in a small field at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1200m, slow going 2.5 len behind Naughty Neil with 58kg at $26. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, 4th of 7 at Dalby 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 3 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Hold My Hand with 56kg at $7.50. Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily second last of 7 at Gold Coast 2yo Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1200m, slow going 3.5 len behind Written Aclaim with 56kg at $21. Improver with claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide without cover early.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second of 7 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw December 6 over 1000m, a neck behind Tosen Sabi with 54kg at $1.26. On debut second of 11 at Sunshine Coast 2yo Hcp November 22 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Scartoon with 57kg at $14. Everything points to a bold return.
